doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains implausible provisions (unauthorized practice waiver, no pre-filing attorney review requirement) that contradict California State Bar ethics rules and cannot be verified as authentic institutional material.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contains several implausible elements inconsistent with actual California State Bar practice, including a purported blanket waiver of unauthorized practice requirements (§5) that would contradict Business & Professions Code §6125, and a provision allowing paralegal work without pre-filing attorney review in time-sensitive matters, which contradicts established California legal ethics rules requiring attorney supervision.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contains implausible provisions (unauthorized practice waiver, no pre-filing attorney review requirement) that contradict California State Bar ethics rules and cannot be verified as authentic institutional material.
